keys.description: Per-branch facility catalogue (list of facility rows for a branch, filtered by status='active'). Read by SDUI list screens + the available-slots widget's facility picker.
Cross-branch facility catalogue for tenant-wide reports.
Facility.availability_json + blackout_dates + status. Read hot by the available-slots endpoint (fac-heavy tenant hits this thousands of times per day).
Facility.pricing_json. Read by PricingCalculator on every booking create. 5-min TTL because pricing changes are rare + we invalidate on change.
Computed available slot list for a facility on a specific date. Materialised on first request; invalidated on any booking-create for the facility on that date OR any blackout-add on that date.
Booked slot count for a facility on a specific date. Feeds the utilisation-bar widget.
Active passes for a user (used by the pass-credits-remaining widget + the booking flow's PassCreditGate). TTL is short because credit consumption invalidates aggressively.
Passes applicable to a facility (facility_id = ? OR facility_id IS NULL AND branch_id = facility.branch_id).
Today's day-pass ledger for reception dashboards. Refreshed every 60s.
Utilisation + revenue rollup per facility per (day/week/month) window. Powers the audit-usage dashboards on both tenant + platform planes.
